title: agrostis subulata
intro: Agrostis subulata, also known as red top or hair grass, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Agrostis subulata include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Agrostis subulata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
